steps.title: Open the parenthetical name
steps.content: The phrase 'or FESTAC '77, as the event was more commonly known' interrupts the main sentence to give a shorter name for the festival. Because the interruption ends with an em dash after 'known,' it should begin with a matching em dash after 'Culture.'

steps.title: Match the punctuation pair
steps.content: Choice A uses a colon, which does not pair with the later em dash. Choice C uses a comma, which also does not match the closing dash. Choice D provides no punctuation to open the interrupting phrase. The answer is B.
